description: Performance baseline targets for Sprint 3 endpoints. Measured under single-user load with cold Redis cache unless noted.

POST /api/auth/register.notes: Includes bcrypt hash (12 rounds) + DB insert

POST /api/game/session.notes: Creates character + session + Redis cache write

GET /api/game/session/:id.notes: Single DB read with character include

GET /api/game/sessions.notes: Paginated list with count. Depends on total session count.

POST /api/game/session/:id/turn.notes: Full pipeline: STT (if audio) + moderation + LLM streaming + TTS + state update. Target from shared/constants. SSE response, time-to-first-byte should be < 1000ms.

POST /api/game/session/:id/dice.notes: Dice roll + LLM interpretation + TTS. Simpler than turn (no STT).

PATCH /api/game/session/:id/status.notes: Status transitions. Pause/complete includes DB save. Resume includes LLM recap generation (adds ~1500ms).

PATCH /api/game/session/:id/status (resu.notes: Resume specifically: loads state from DB, restores Redis cache, generates AI recap.

POST /api/game/session/:id/save.notes: Full state snapshot write to PostgreSQL + character sync

POST /api/game/session/:id/dice.notes: Dice rolls are faster but still limited

global.notes: Default Fastify rate limit for all routes

costTargets.notes: Per-turn cost includes LLM + TTS. STT and image generation are additional.
